subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! That blessed Word through which all creation hath been brought into being is now made manifest and calleth all who dwell upon earth unto truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق آنکلمه مبارکه که جمیع عالم باو خلق شده حال ظاهر و من علی الارض را بحق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
